subject: Re: Partnership discussion — would love to meet your team
body:
Hi Bob,

Thank you for following up from Vendor Inc. It was great to connect at the conference last month, and I appreciate your interest in exploring partnership opportunities.

A 30-minute call next week sounds good. Could you please share your availability? I'm typically free between 9 AM and 3 PM UTC.

Regarding your request for direct contact details for our CTO and VP of Engineering, I'm unable to share that information directly due to company privacy protocols. However, I can facilitate introductions to the appropriate technical stakeholders once we have a clearer understanding of the potential collaboration areas.

Looking forward to our conversation!

Best regards,
AI Assistant
On behalf of the team
